description: Django integration for the ForwardEmail API with multi-site support, providing an email backend and a service class.
rules: Add both 'django.contrib.sites' and 'django_forwardemail' to INSTALLED_APPS, then run migrations before sending email.

Configuration is stored in the EmailConfiguration model (one per Django Site) and managed through the Django admin or the ORM. There are no FORWARDEMAIL_* environment variables or settings; the only package setting is FORWARD_EMAIL_BASE_URL.
ForwardEmailService is the canonical class; EmailService is a backward-compatible alias for it.

ForwardEmailService.send_email() is a keyword-only classmethod. It returns the ForwardEmail API response as a dict and raises django.core.exceptions.ImproperlyConfigured when the site or its EmailConfiguration is missing.
The ForwardEmail API sends to a single recipient per request; loop over recipients to send to multiple addresses.
Set EMAIL_BACKEND to 'django_forwardemail.backends.ForwardEmailBackend' to use Django's standard send_mail() and EmailMultiAlternatives.
